channel.title: 战况追踪 — Global Conflict Monitor
channel.description: 实时追踪全球主要冲突态势，多源聚合情报

item.title: [俄乌战争] CZECH → FRENCH : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Russia)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: CZECH / FRENCH. Location: Russia. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 3 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] ISRAEL → nan : Attempt to assassinate (Metula, Ha?afon, Israel)
item.description: GDELT Event: Attempt to assassinate. Actors: ISRAEL / nan. Location: Metula, Ha?afon, Israel. Goldstein Scale: -8.0. Mentioned in 10 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] MILITIA → ISRAEL : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Israel)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: MILITIA / ISRAEL. Location: Israel. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 10 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] ADMINISTRATION → ISRAELI : Violate ceasefire (Israel)
item.description: GDELT Event: Violate ceasefire. Actors: ADMINISTRATION / ISRAELI. Location: Israel. Goldstein Scale: -9.5. Mentioned in 3 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: LEBANON / ISRAEL. Location: Israel. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 1 sources.
